response: The Charkhi Dadri mid-air collision occurred on 12 November 1996, while the Tenerife airport disaster took place on March 27, 1977. The Tenerife airport disaster is the deadliest aviation accident in history, killing 583 people, whereas the Charkhi Dadri mid-air collision resulted in the death of 349 people. Therefore, the Tenerife airport disaster occurred first.
